faq.title: Earn Xbox Gift Cards in {country} - FAQ

items.question: What are Xbox gift cards?
items.answer: Xbox gift cards add funds to your Microsoft account balance, which you can use to buy games, DLC, Game Pass subscriptions, movies, apps, and hardware on Xbox consoles and Windows PC via the Microsoft Store.

items.question: How do I earn Xbox gift cards?
items.answer: You can earn Xbox gift cards by playing featured games, completing gaming surveys, using Microsoft Rewards, finishing Game Pass quests, unlocking achievements, referring friends, and completing offers.

items.question: Are these real Xbox gift cards?
items.answer: Yes! All rewards are official Xbox & Microsoft Store gift cards that work directly on your Xbox console or Windows PC. We partner with legitimate offer providers to ensure you get real Xbox credit.

items.question: What is Microsoft Rewards?
items.answer: Microsoft Rewards is a loyalty program that gives you points for searching with Bing, completing quizzes, shopping at Microsoft Store, and more. Points can be redeemed for Xbox gift cards, Game Pass, and other rewards.

items.question: Is this really free?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! Signing up and earning is completely free. There are no hidden fees or subscriptions. You just complete gaming-related activities and get paid in Xbox credit.

items.question: How long does it take to get my first Xbox gift card?
items.answer: Most users earn their first $5 Xbox gift card within 24-48 hours of signing up. Microsoft Rewards can get you $5-10 per month with daily use.

items.question: How do I redeem my Xbox gift card?
items.answer: Once you have enough points, go to the Rewards section, select Xbox Gift Card, choose your amount ($5-$100), and click Redeem. The code will be sent instantly to your email. Redeem on your Xbox console or at microsoft.com/redeem.

items.question: Do I need an Xbox console?
items.answer: No! Xbox gift cards work on Windows PC too. You can use them to buy games and apps from the Microsoft Store on your computer.

items.question: What's the minimum payout amount?
items.answer: The minimum payout is just $5 Xbox credit. This makes it easy to cash out frequently!

items.question: What can I buy with Xbox credit?
items.answer: You can buy Xbox games, DLC, Game Pass subscriptions, movies, TV shows, apps, Xbox hardware (controllers, headsets), and more. You can also gift games to friends.

items.question: How much can I earn per month?
items.answer: Most active users earn $20-50 in Xbox credit per month. Power users using Microsoft Rewards, Game Pass quests, and surveys can earn $100+ monthly.

items.question: What is Xbox Game Pass?
items.answer: Xbox Game Pass is a subscription service giving you access to 100+ games for a monthly fee. You can use Xbox credit to pay for Game Pass Ultimate or Core subscriptions.

items.question: Do Xbox gift cards expire?
items.answer: Once redeemed to your Microsoft account, the funds expire after 90 days of inactivity. However, if you make any purchase (even free), the clock resets. Codes themselves usually have no expiration.

items.question: What are Game Pass Quests?
items.answer: Game Pass Quests are challenges within Game Pass games that reward Microsoft Rewards points. Complete daily, weekly, and monthly quests to earn points for Xbox credit.

items.question: Can I earn Xbox gift cards on mobile?
items.answer: Absolutely! Use the Xbox mobile app, Microsoft Rewards app, or our platform on your phone to earn Xbox credit on the go.

items.question: What's the best way to earn Xbox credit?
items.answer: For consistent daily earnings, use Microsoft Rewards (search with Bing daily). For larger earnings, combine surveys, offers, and Game Pass quests.

items.question: Are Xbox gift card generators real?
items.answer: NO! Xbox gift card generators are scams. They don't work and can steal your account or personal information. Always use legitimate earning methods like ours.

items.question: Can I use Xbox credit for Game Pass?
items.answer: Yes! You can use your Xbox credit to pay for Game Pass Ultimate, Core, or PC Game Pass subscriptions.

items.question: What's Xbox Game Pass Ultimate?
items.answer: Game Pass Ultimate includes Xbox Game Pass for console and PC, EA Play, Xbox Live Gold, and cloud gaming. All for one monthly price you can pay with Xbox credit.
